preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes successfully before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify guest user can directly access the Home page using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Wait for the Home page to finish loading.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads the Home page successfully in guest state without requiring authentication and the browser URL remains http://localhost/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Person/Profile button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Back button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Notification button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Home button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Customer signup button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Clean survey button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Observe the Site survey button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive before user interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify selecting the Person/Profile button navigates the guest user to the login page URL
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the login page and the browser URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify selecting the Customer signup button navigates the guest user to the customer-search workflow entry URL
steps: Click the Customer signup button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the customer-search workflow and the resulting URL contains /customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify selecting the Clean survey button navigates the guest user to the vehicle-survey workflow entry URL
steps: Click the Clean survey button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the vehicle-survey workflow and the resulting URL contains vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify selecting the Site survey button navigates the guest user to the survey workflow entry URL
steps: Click the Site survey button once.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page to the survey workflow and the resulting URL contains survey?data.
